_comment: Optional user personalization for Soniox v4 / Live APIs. Copy this file to 'personal_settings.json' and customize the vocabulary block. If 'personal_settings.json' is absent, SONIOX_CONTEXT stays None and no personalization is sent. Only used by the Soniox v4 Async and Live transcribers — ignored by other APIs.

general.value: Your main topics here (e.g. software development, academic writing, specific field)

terms: Technical term the model often misrecognizes
Foreign word commonly used in your dictation
